name: AWG, Ltd.
summary: AWG, Ltd. produces and sells wine. The company offers Montona Reserve series, Napa Valley series, and Villa Andretti series of wines. It sells its wine directly through winery, as well as through distributors to shops and restaurants in the United States and internationally. The company was formerly knowns as American Aurum and changed its name to AWG, Ltd. in December 1995. AWG, Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Napa, California.
